welcome_message: Namaste! Zaiqa Restaurant mein aapka swagat hai! Order, booking ya koi sawaal? Main yahan hoon 🍽️

faqs.a: Aapke area ke hisaab se delivery 30-45 minute mein ho jaati hai.
Minimum order Rs. 199 hai home delivery ke liye.
Table booking ke liye apna naam, date, time aur kitne log hain yeh batayein. Main confirm kar dunga.
Hum UPI, Cash on Delivery, aur Card payment accept karte hain.

faqs.q: kya aap veg non veg dono rakhte hain
faqs.a: Ji haan, hamare paas pure Veg aur Non-Veg dono options available hain.

special_offers: Free dessert on birthdays — bas ID dikhao
